server_only_columns.rationale: Server-side soft-delete cursor column added by the sync v2 clean-room migration (designs/t1.md §1, §4.2). Plan-2 (sync-v2-client) ships the matching client column; until then the server has it and the client doesn't, which would otherwise fire the §7.3 step 4e warn-line and break --strict invocations.

untyped_text_references.rationale: muscle_groups is client-only taxonomy; see designs/t1.md §2.6.1
